name: plugin install copies the source-folder content from the plugin repo into _community/<plugin-id>/<plugin-namespace>/
command:
mkdir -p stub-clones/acme/example/generated-code-quality-standards/example-namespace && printf 'name: example
rules: [{id: foo, detector: x}]
' > stub-clones/acme/example/plugin.yaml && printf 'source:
  id: example-src
rules: []
' > stub-clones/acme/example/generated-code-quality-standards/example-namespace/main.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/plugin-install.sh" acme/example --gh-clone-stub stub-clones --rule-tester-stub pass 2>err.txt && [ -f generated-code-quality-standards/_community/example/example-namespace/main.yaml ] && echo ok 1>&2
